title: Wild Bows
description: A mod that adds several new bows with levels and effects for combat.
body:
# A mod that adds several new bows with levels and effects for combat.

![Wild Bows Text Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5e1c3b703d0ce11c615cd44003b052aea5e50a6.png)

The arch (from the Latin arcu) is a rounded curved construction element, usually made of masonry, which frames the upper part of a gap (opening, passage) or recess, supporting the vertical weight of the wall on which it stands.

This mod adds several new bows with different abilities and levels.

Upgrade your bows and become the strongest archer in Minecraft
